case_title: DENN S. BAISA VS. RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REPLY TO P&A IN OPPOS TO PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER BAISA, DENN S.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-17-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DENN BAISA'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1094.5 IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE ADMINISTRATIVE FINDINGS ARE CONTRARY TO THE WEIGHT OF EVIDENCE PRESENTED BASED ON PETITIONER'S MENTAL DISABILITY. THE PETITIONER HAS SHOWN THAT SHE IS INCAPACITATED TO PERFORM HER DUTIES AS A SENIOR CLERK TYPIST DUE TO HER MENTAL DISABILITY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. HEBEL, TEL. NO. 613-1726 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. REBECCA LIU, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3870 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER DENN BAISA's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5. IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE ADMINISTRATIVE FINDINGS ARE CONTRARY TO THE WEIGHT OF EVIDENCE PRESENTED BASED ON PETITIONER'S MENTAL DISABILITY. THE PETITIONER HAS SHOWN THAT SHE IS INCAPACITATED TO PERFORM HER DUTIES AS A SENIOR CLERK TYPIST DUE TO HER MENTAL DISABILITY. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
